_note: Vocabulary not jukebox. These inform decisions, not dictate them. Use drums_from_string() patterns directly.

dnb.texture: sparse noise_breath, ghost_echo for dub delay
dnb.key_vibe: dark, relentless, breakbeat energy, jungle cat through concrete
dnb.references: Goldie, LTJ Bukem, Roni Size, Photek

hiphop.texture: noise_breath for vinyl crackle (n=25, low vol), warm triangle pad
hiphop.key_vibe: lazy, head-nod, lo-fi warmth, fire escape vibes
hiphop.references: J Dilla, Madlib, MF DOOM, Nujabes

italo_disco.texture: bright square melody, detuned sawtooth pads, sparkle runs at transitions
italo_disco.key_vibe: dramatic, European melancholy, synth-driven, Moroder pulse
italo_disco.references: Giorgio Moroder, Gazebo, Koto, Den Harrow

ambient.texture: noise_breath, ghost_echo, sub_rumble, long reverb tails
ambient.key_vibe: spacious, contemplative, breath between sounds IS the music
ambient.references: Brian Eno, Stars of the Lid, William Basinski

gabber.texture: harsh, distorted, minimal layers, stinger hits
gabber.references: Rotterdam Terror Corps, Neophyte, The Speed Freak

detroit_techno.texture: clean pads, sparkle accents, sub_rumble foundation
detroit_techno.key_vibe: futuristic, soulful machines, cosmic, Belleville Three
detroit_techno.references: Juan Atkins, Derrick May, Kevin Saunderson, Jeff Mills

dub.bass: sine with heavy delay and reverb
dub.texture: heavy delay (400ms+), long reverb, ghost_echo everywhere, noise_breath for tape hiss
dub.key_vibe: spacious, echo-drenched, bass pressure, Kingston midnight
dub.references: King Tubby, Lee Scratch Perry, Mad Professor, Basic Channel

bossa_nova.texture: warm triangle arps, sine pads, minimal effects, clean and intimate
bossa_nova.key_vibe: gentle, sophisticated, sunlit, café at golden hour
bossa_nova.references: Tom Jobim, Joao Gilberto, Stan Getz

grime.bass: square sub wobble, aggressive lowpass sweeps
grime.texture: sparse, aggressive, ice-cold synth stabs, skippy hi-hats
grime.key_vibe: cold, urban, confrontational, East London pirate radio

vaporwave.texture: everything through heavy reverb + lowpass, bitcrush 8 for warm SNES feel, tremolo on pads
vaporwave.key_vibe: nostalgic, mall at 3am, dead consumerism, beautiful decay
vaporwave.references: Macintosh Plus, Saint Pepsi, Chuck Person
